meaning: n.<西>理想中的黄金国,富庶之乡
examples: He holds the speed records both up (5:33) and down (10:42) Eldorado Springs Canyon's Bastille Crack.
So far the state has taken custody of at least 401 children peacefully removed from the Yearning for Zion Ranch near Eldorado.
Every morning Madam Duff goes on to the beach to plead with young men intent of gambling their lives in a quest for an eldorado in Europe.
Eldorado Gold is a gold producing and exploration company with gold assets in Brazil and Turkey.
There are 30 such clusters around the town of Eldorado in the Ribeira valley.
